q: How to pivot supply chain overnight without losing CRM trust
diagnostic: A supply chain pivot that damages customer trust is not a pivot — it is a crisis. The Grand Strategist's boardroom calculates the most antifragile move AND drafts the customer-facing communication simultaneously. Both execute in parallel.
answer: A supply chain pivot that damages customer trust is not a pivot — it is a crisis. The Grand Strategist's boardroom calculates the most antifragile move AND drafts the customer-facing communication simultaneously. Both execute in parallel.
description: Brittle integration — as systems become more automated, they become more fragile. Geopolitical volatility compresses planning horizons to 48 hours.
symptom: One tariff change disrupts the quarter. One API outage stops the factory. The CEO no longer understands how their own company works.
